title: sagenia vitis
intro: Sagenia vitis, also known as the spleenwort fern, is a type of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family that is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Sagenia vitis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Sagenia vitis typically involve drying the leaves and stems, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
